scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client && cd server && DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_BUILD_URL:-$DATABASE_URL} npx prisma generate && DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_BUILD_URL:-$DATABASE_URL} node prisma/pre-migrate.js && DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_BUILD_URL:-$DATABASE_URL} npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_BUILD_URL:-$DATABASE_URL} node prisma/seed.js && DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_BUILD_URL:-$DATABASE_URL} node prisma/seed-moves.js
